ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., Confirmed) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the individual */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB where the case is recorded */,
  "overseas_travel" TEXT /* Indication of overseas travel history (e.g., Yes, No, Unknown) */,
  "historical_health" TEXT /* Historical health data relevant to the case */,
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of case (e.g., Infectious Disease, Non-Infectious Disease) */,
  "symptoms_reported" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the individual */,
  "disease_code" TEXT /* Disease code (e.g., ICD-10 code) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Person/organization who reported the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhb ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dhb" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DHB */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the District Health Board */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the DHB operates */,
  "population_served" INTEGER /* Population served by the DHB */,
  "chief_executive" TEXT /* Name of the Chief Executive of the DHB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, epidemiologist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Outbreak, Threshold Exceeded) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the historical data */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition diagnosed in the past */,
  "date_diagnosed" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  "date_resolved" TEXT /* Date when the condition was resolved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated case */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level category of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated case */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the case was reported */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Confirmed, Recovered, Under Investigation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status means */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type (e.g., Infectious Disease, Non-Infectious Disease) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case that has changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status before the change */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated case */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory result */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated case */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the laboratory test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the laboratory test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of laboratory test conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated case */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication administered */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated case */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., Recovered, Deceased, Lost to follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
